courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Five Rooms One Rule
genericDescription: Reuse a mechanic across multiple contexts; create variety through constraints; stage difficulty progression.
specificDescription: Five compact levels built around a single dash-to-token mechanic, each adding a new constraint: space, timing, enemy, information, and resource.
gradingRubric: 30 pts constraint design; 20 pts level variety; 20 pts progression; 15 pts clarity; 15 pts playtest evidence.
